dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7724 IH: No Waivers for Fraud Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Wilson of South Carolina introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 to sustain sanctions against noncompliant State under such Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Waivers for Fraud Act
Section 658I(c) of the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 (42 U.S.C. 9858lg(c)) is amended—

paragraph.text: ) in paragraph (1) by striking or sanctions imposed upon a State in accordance with subsection (b)(2),

subparagraph.text: in subparagraph (A) by striking sanction or, and
in subparagraph (B) by striking sanction or,

paragraph.text: in paragraph (3) striking sanction or, and
in paragraph (7) by striking sanction(s) or.
